name: AAVE Staging Faucet
notes: Import token 0x8153A21dFeB1F67024aA6C6e611432900FF3dcb9 in Metamask, connect to staging.aave.com, click Faucet for 100 AAVE. Uses ETH address.

name: Polypore Faucet
notes: No captcha. Switched from theta to provider testnet.

name: Cardano Preprod Faucet
notes: Select Preprod Testnet from dropdown. Explorer: https://preprod.cardanoscan.io/transaction/

name: BNB Smart Chain Faucet
notes: Only Smart Chain (0x...) addresses accepted. Forward to Beacon Chain (tbnb...) via Binance Wallet if needed.

name: BitcoinFaucet UO1
notes: Does not work with SegWit addresses.

name: CoinFaucet BTC Testnet
notes: Alternative when bitcoinfaucet.uo1.net fails. Does not work with SegWit.

name: Polkadot Westend Faucet
notes: Web faucet: paste your Westend address, solve the captcha, Submit. 100 WND per request, once per 24h. Add ?parachain=1000 to fund an Asset Hub address. The old #westend_faucet Matrix room is dead — ignore it.

name: Google Cloud Sepolia Faucet
notes: Lowest-friction Sepolia faucet: no mainnet-balance requirement. Sign in with any Google account, paste your 0x address, claim (~0.05 ETH/day). Replaces the retired sepoliafaucet.io. Backup with no login: pk910 PoW faucet at https://sepolia-faucet.pk910.de/ (mine in-browser, hCaptcha). Avoid Alchemy's faucet — it now requires mainnet ETH + activity.

name: SolFaucet
notes: Click Testnet tab. Alternatives: Triangle, QuickNode airdrop.

name: XRPL Tx Sender
notes: Historically unreliable.

name: AlgoExplorer Dispenser
notes: Alternative: AlgoKit lora.

name: Stellar Friendbot
notes: This is an API, not a web page — opening the bare URL shows a 'Bad Request' JSON response, which is normal. To fund an account, append ?addr=<your-address> to the URL. Alternatives: Freighter wallet built-in faucet, Stellar Lab account funder, Demo Wallet (10,000 XLM).

check.reason: Bare GET returns 400 JSON asking for addr — that means the service is healthy.

name: Circle Faucet
notes: 10 USDC/EURC every 24h. If XLM daily limit exceeded, swap XLM->USDC via Freighter on Testnet.

name: Core Avalanche Fuji Faucet
notes: Up to 2 AVAX per claim, 24h cooldown. Replaces the dead Covalent faucet. Gated: the address must hold >0 AVAX on Avalanche mainnet. Empty wallet? Get a coupon from https://guild.xyz/avalanche or the Avalanche Discord and enter it on the faucet. faucet.avax.network redirects here.

name: Flow Testnet Faucet
notes: 1000 FLOW per request. Moved here from testnet-faucet.onflow.org.

name: Polygon Faucet
notes: Requires Discord connection.

name: Core Testnet Faucet
notes: Mainnet swap CORE<->USDT-CORE at https://app.corex.network/

name: Sui Faucet Docs
notes: Docs page, not a direct faucet UI. Also obtainable via Discord.

name: Hedera Portal
notes: Requires Hedera Portal account.

name: Dash CrowdNode Faucet
notes: HTTP only (no TLS).

name: Hiro Stacks Sandbox Faucet
notes: Connect a Stacks wallet (Leather or Xverse), confirm the network toggle is on Testnet, open the Faucet tab, and click Request STX (500 tSTX). The old api.testnet.hiro.so endpoint is dead — the API host moved to api.hiro.so.

name: Faucy
notes: Connect supported wallet (e.g. Subwallet). 0.5 tVFY per claim.

name: Polygon Amoy Faucet
notes: Paste address, click CLAIM. 0.01 POL per claim. Same site as the MATIC entry.

name: Aptos Testnet Faucet
notes: Requires Google account.

check.reason: SPA returns 404 to a plain request but works in a browser (verified manually).

name: Provenance Testnet (via Discord)
notes: No confirmed public web faucet. The old explorer.test.provenance.io has reached end of life; the new explorer is Zonescan (https://zonescan.io). Request testnet HASH via the Provenance Discord — see the developer portal for the current channel.

check.reason: No public web faucet; testnet HASH is requested via the Provenance Discord. Verify the current channel manually.
